atomicity.message: Staged payload is one docs-only dogfooding findings update for dogfooding-findings-3402.

conditions.message: The current staged findings-log payload passes applicable mechanical diff checks for this docs-only slice.
evidence: `go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json` returned the current staged hash with only the findings doc included.
`git diff --cached --name-status` showed exactly `M docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md`.
`git diff --cached --check` exited 0 with no whitespace or patch-integrity output.
`sha256sum backpressure/lint-rules.md` matched the packet condition hash.

conditions.message: The current staged payload is a single docs finding-log update. It adds distinct findings and updates the next-ID marker without duplicated sections, duplicate IDs, or repeated implementation logic.
evidence: `go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json` returned the current staged hash and included only `docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md`.
`git diff --cached --stat -- docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md` showed one file changed with 189 insertions and 1 deletion.
`git show :docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md | awk ... | uniq -d` returned no duplicate finding IDs.
